title: Amtech - Claw Hammer, Heavy Duty Fibreglass Handle, Drop Forged Head, Comfortable Non-Slip Grip, Ideal for Construction and Renovation (20oz / 560g)
features: USAGE: Suitable for driving and removing nails in wood and carpentry.
DROP-FORGED STEEL: Construction for long-lasting strength.
PRACTICAL SIZE: 20oz weight offers balance and control.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products.
